---
title: "Sujan Bhattarai"
image: pic.jpg
resources: resume.pdf
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - text: Email
      icon: envelope-check
      href: mailto:sujan@ucsb.edu
    - text: GitHub
      icon: github
      href: https://github.com/Sujan-Bhattarai12/
    - text: Resume
      icon: file-text
      href: resume.pdf
  id: ppc
---

:::{#ppc}
Use your energy in focus
:::


To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.

```{r}
file.exists("resume.pdf")
```
